project.description: Deploys wildfly-host containers (API, PSAMA, Dictionary) sequentially via a single SSM command to avoid systemd D-Bus race conditions, then waits for Spring Boot startup on all enabled containers in parallel.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -euo pipefail
# ----------------------------- # Load shared bash functions # ----------------------------- source_scripts_folder="${JENKINS_HOME}/workspace/Bash_Functions/" echo "Loading bash functions from: ${source_scripts_folder}" ls -la "${source_scripts_folder}"
shopt -s nullglob for script_file in "${source_scripts_folder}"*.sh; do chmod +x "${script_file}" || true if [[ -f "${script_file}" && -x "${script_file}" ]]; then echo "sourcing ${script_file}" # shellcheck source=/dev/null source "${script_file}" fi done shopt -u nullglob
# Fail fast if the core functions weren't loaded for fn in assume_role wait_for_command wait_for_spring_boot_ssm_logs reset_role; do if ! command -v "${fn}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "ERROR: required function '${fn}' is not loaded from ${source_scripts_folder}" >&2 exit 1 fi done
: "${TARGET_STACK:?TARGET_STACK is required}" : "${S3_BUCKET_NAME:?S3_BUCKET_NAME is required}"
# Default optional parameters DATASET_S3_OBJECT_KEY="${DATASET_S3_OBJECT_KEY:-}" ENABLE_DEBUG="${ENABLE_DEBUG:-false}" SPRING_PROFILE="${SPRING_PROFILE:-prod}"
assume_role
# ----------------------------- # Download terraform state # ----------------------------- echo "Download terraform.tfstate file for ${TARGET_STACK} stack" aws s3 cp "s3://${S3_BUCKET_NAME}/deployment_state_metadata/${TARGET_STACK}/terraform.tfstate" "terraform.tfstate"
# ----------------------------- # Extract Wildfly EC2 instance ID # ----------------------------- echo "Extract WildFly instance ID for ${TARGET_STACK} stack" wildfly_instance_id="$(jq -r '.outputs["wildfly-ec2-id"].value // empty' terraform.tfstate)"
if [[ -z "${wildfly_instance_id}" ]]; then echo "ERROR: Could not extract wildfly_instance_id from terraform.tfstate" >&2 exit 1 fi
echo "WildFly Instance ID: ${wildfly_instance_id}"
# ----------------------------- # Build remote command flags # ----------------------------- deploy_flags="" if [[ "${DEPLOY_API}" == "true" ]]; then deploy_flags="${deploy_flags} --deploy_wildfly" fi if [[ "${DEPLOY_PSAMA}" == "true" ]]; then deploy_flags="${deploy_flags} --deploy_psama" fi if [[ "${DEPLOY_DICTIONARY}" == "true" ]]; then deploy_flags="${deploy_flags} --deploy_dictionary" fi
remote_cmd=$( cat <<EOF sudo /opt/picsure/deploy-wildfly-stack.sh \ ${deploy_flags} \ --stack_s3_bucket "${S3_BUCKET_NAME}" \ --target_stack "${TARGET_STACK}" \ --dataset_s3_object_key "${DATASET_S3_OBJECT_KEY}" \ --enable_debug "${ENABLE_DEBUG}" \ --spring_profile "${SPRING_PROFILE}" EOF )
echo "${remote_cmd}"
remote_cmd_json="$(jq -n --arg cmd "${remote_cmd}" '{commands: [$cmd]}')"
# ----------------------------- # Send single SSM command # ----------------------------- command_id="$( aws ssm send-command \ --instance-ids "${wildfly_instance_id}" \ --document-name "AWS-RunShellScript" \ --comment "Deploy Wildfly Stack (API+PSAMA+Dictionary)" \ --parameters "${remote_cmd_json}" \ --timeout-seconds 600 \ --query "Command.CommandId" \ --output text )"
wait_for_command "${command_id}" "${wildfly_instance_id}"
# ----------------------------- # Wait for Spring Boot startup on all enabled containers (in parallel) # ----------------------------- pids=()
if [[ "${DEPLOY_API}" == "true" ]]; then wait_for_spring_boot_ssm_logs "${wildfly_instance_id}" "wildfly" "started in" & pids+=($!) fi
if [[ "${DEPLOY_PSAMA}" == "true" ]]; then wait_for_spring_boot_ssm_logs "${wildfly_instance_id}" "psama" & pids+=($!) fi
if [[ "${DEPLOY_DICTIONARY}" == "true" ]]; then wait_for_spring_boot_ssm_logs "${wildfly_instance_id}" "dictionary-api" & pids+=($!) fi
failed=false for pid in "${pids[@]}"; do if ! wait "${pid}"; then failed=true fi done
if [[ "${failed}" == "true" ]]; then echo "ERROR: One or more Spring Boot applications failed to start." exit 1 fi
echo "All wildfly-host containers started successfully."
reset_role
